spec.globalPrompt: Create one photorealistic cinematic scene image for a modern web novel. Keep the style consistent with the title, character, and background assets. Use realistic anatomy, realistic materials, grounded faces, and live-action-like lighting.
spec.globalNegativePrompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, readable letters, chapter labels, talk labels, section labels, subtitles, captions, logo, watermark, UI overlay, collage, split panel, multiple moments in one frame, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, malformed hands, direct eye contact with camera, looking at viewer, portrait-style posing for the viewer
spec.promptSuffix: In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.

characters.name: サトー
characters.visualRules: Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear.

characters.name: セラ
characters.visualRules: Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the apartment-departure incident paired with scene-001-001-002-sera.
Keep the same dawn apartment corridor, doorway, and cool spring jogging outfit continuity in both images.
scene-001-001-001-sato.promptSuffix: Compose a calm early-morning apartment departure scene with Sato dominant near his doorway or hallway mirror, already dressed for a cool spring jog. The mood should be orderly and quietly pleased. If Sera appears at all, place her far away near a stairwell shadow or service corner, clearly separate from Sato.
scene-001-001-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not place Sera beside Sato as a companion. Do not make the apartment scene feel like open action.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same apartment-departure incident as scene-001-001-001-sato.
Keep the same apartment corridor, parcel area, and dawn light as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background figure leaving home and must not look toward the incident.
scene-001-001-002-sera.promptSuffix: Create a covert apartment-corridor action image with Sera dominant as she stops a courier-disguised abduction operative near parcel cases, a service panel, or an emergency staircase. Keep Sato smaller in the background just heading out for his run and unaware.
scene-001-001-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not show Sato fighting, helping, or reacting. Do not let the attacker resemble Sato.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the bridge incident paired with scene-001-002-002-sera.
Keep the same cherry-blossom riverside approach, urban bridge, and cool spring wind mood in both images.
scene-001-002-001-sato.promptSuffix: Show Sato dominant running from a cherry-blossom-lined embankment onto an urban river bridge, with visible spring petals, morning light, and a strong sense of fresh air. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato near stairs, bridge shadows, or far along the path, never companion-like.
scene-001-002-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not make Sato look alarmed or combat-ready. Do not introduce shrine, temple, engawa, tatami, or old religious architecture.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same bridge incident as scene-001-002-001-sato.
Keep the same bridge, same stair landing, and same blossom-caught morning wind as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background runner further along the bridge and must face his route rather than the incident.
scene-001-002-002-sera.promptSuffix: Create a tense bridge-landing action image with Sera dominant, stopping a slip-and-grab ambush involving a fake cyclist, a saboteur near anti-slip flooring, or abductors waiting by bridge stairs. Keep Sato smaller in the background, simply running onward and unaware.
scene-001-002-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not let attackers resemble Sato. Do not bring Sato into the action. Do not introduce shrine or temple motifs.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the blossom-tunnel incident paired with scene-002-001-002-sera.
Keep the same curved riverside path, blossom canopy, and drifting petals in both images.
scene-002-001-001-sato.promptSuffix: Show Sato dominant running through a curved riverside tunnel of cherry blossoms, with petals sweeping across the path and a light, enjoyable cruising rhythm. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato near the outer edge of the path or under deeper shadows, never companion-like.
scene-002-001-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not stage Sato and Sera as a jogging pair.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same blossom-tunnel incident as scene-002-001-001-sato.
Keep the same curved path, same blossom canopy, and same petal flow as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background runner on the path and must keep his gaze along the route rather than toward the incident.
scene-002-001-002-sera.promptSuffix: Create a covert path-protection action image with Sera dominant under the blossom canopy, stopping a fake family setup involving an empty stroller, a low wire trap, and a blanket meant to drag Sato off the path. Keep Sato smaller in the background, still running and unaware.
scene-002-001-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not let the attacker resemble Sato. Do not make Sato engage with the action.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the shrine-turnaround incident paired with scene-002-002-002-sera.
Keep the same small riverside shrine, stone steps, and turnaround mood in both images.
scene-002-002-001-sato.promptSuffix: Compose a quiet turnaround moment with Sato dominant near a small urban waterside shrine with stone steps, modest grounds, spring blossoms, and a calm breathing break before he turns back. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato near the outer path, a tree shadow, or a service lane, never companion-like.
scene-002-002-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not make the shrine grand, fantastical, or ancient-temple-like. Avoid engawa, tatami interiors, or exaggerated religious spectacle.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same shrine-turnaround incident as scene-002-002-001-sato.
Keep the same shrine grounds, same stone steps, and same spring light as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background figure pausing or turning back, and must not look toward Sera or the incident.
scene-002-002-002-sera.promptSuffix: Create a covert shrine-back action image with Sera dominant as she stops disguised abductors using a restraint case and a service-lane vehicle behind a small riverside shrine. Keep Sato smaller in the background, simply taking a walking break and unaware.
scene-002-002-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not let attackers resemble Sato. Do not make Sato aware of the intervention. Avoid temple interiors, tatami rooms, or engawa staging.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the bakery incident paired with scene-003-001-002-sera.
Keep the same neighborhood bakery frontage, same paper bag, and same post-run mood in both images.
scene-003-001-001-sato.promptSuffix: Create a warm post-run bakery scene with Sato dominant receiving or carrying a paper bag and coffee outside a neighborhood bakery, visibly satisfied with the morning jog but still dressed in jogging wear. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato outside the storefront or across the street, never companion-like.
scene-003-001-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not show Sera standing at the counter with Sato.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same bakery incident as scene-003-001-001-sato.
Keep the same bakery exterior, same paper bag continuity, and same morning neighborhood light as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background figure near the storefront and must not look toward Sera or the incident.
scene-003-001-002-sera.promptSuffix: Create a covert storefront action image with Sera dominant outside the bakery, stopping a snatch setup around a display board, curbside bicycle, or side lane where abductors are trying to make Sato drop breakfast and drag him away. Keep Sato smaller in the background leaving the shop and unaware.
scene-003-001-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not let any attacker resemble Sato. Do not make Sato participate.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the apartment-intrusion incident paired with scene-003-002-002-sera.
Keep the same apartment home setting, same balcony or open window, and same post-run breakfast continuity in both images.
scene-003-002-001-sato.promptSuffix: Compose a calm post-run home scene with Sato dominant on a modest apartment balcony or by an open window, cooling down while coffee and breakfast wait inside. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato on a distant exterior line, rooftop shadow, or corridor edge, never companion-like.
scene-003-002-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not include Sera in the room as a companion. Do not turn the apartment into a detached house.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same apartment-intrusion incident as scene-003-002-001-sato.
Keep the same apartment exterior relationship, same corridor or balcony line, and same late-morning spring light as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background figure preparing breakfast or cooling down, and must face away from the incident or look elsewhere.
scene-003-002-002-sera.promptSuffix: Create a restrained apartment-intrusion action image with Sera dominant as she stops a fake delivery operative with an unlock device and a rooftop support operative trying to reach Sato's balcony or door. Keep Sato smaller in the background, inside the apartment and unaware.
scene-003-002-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not let any attacker resemble Sato. Do not break the domestic calm. Do not turn the building into a detached house.
